docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARAVITI, KEYON AS TO DEFENDANT HEALY, JOHN
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARAVITI, KEYON
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-17-2021 AT 3:30 P.M. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-17-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEYON TARAVITI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT JOHN HEALY IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $225.00. NO APPERANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED SEP-27-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HEALY, JOHN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,350.00 FILED BY TARAVITI, KEYON AS TO DEFENDANT HEALY, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARAVITI, KEYON
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
